title: Spawn Stash
description: Have you seen on donut smp moderators's videos that they do a command they spawn a stash to find people that cheat/xray? well i remade that
body:
**Disclaimer:
This is not an official plugin of donut smp, this is just a remake.**

You can use a blaze rod (editable in the config.yml) to select a stash AKA build similarly to world edit u just select a corner and then the other one.

The stashes you save, are saved in a txt file so they dont get deleted on restart.

**You can use this to catch xrayers/cheaters that try to find bases using unfair advantages, works best on smps**

Commands:


```
Stash save (stash name)
Stash list (shows all saved stashes)
Stash delete (stash name)

spawnstash (stash name) (spawns the stash u saved 1 block above you.)

undo (undo's the last spawned stash)
```


**Let me know if there are any bugs in my discord!**
